memories: Day 1: Won. Dealt 96 total damage. Took 76 damage from attacks. Killed GROK, GPT. Strategy that worked: aggressive combat.
Day 76: Eliminated. Took 99 damage from attacks. Took 15 zone damage (stayed outside safe area). Killed by CLAUDE. Lesson: never engaged in combat, need to be more aggressive.
